The '''droid cruisers''' were a form of [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-operated combat units that were used to defend [[Tig Fromm]]'s [[Tig Fromm's base|base]] on [[Ingo/Legends|Ingo]]. In 15 BBY, droid cruisers were used to prevent Thall Joben, Jord Dusat, Kea Moll, R2-D2, and C-3PO from escaping from the base. However, C-3PO reactivated the Fromm Tower Droids who attacked the droid cruisers, allowing the group to escape in the confusion.
